prompt_inputs.goal: High-carb fueling for a long marathon training run tomorrow

solution_criteria: Meal plan is for a single day and clearly compact/concise
Carbohydrate intake is clearly prioritized (majority of calories from carb-rich foods)
Plan reflects portions/energy appropriate for an endurance athlete preparing for a long training day
task_description: write a compact,concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an endurance athlete (marathon runner) needing high-carb fueling before a long training day

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and support recovery for competitive weightlifting

solution_criteria: Provides a full 1-day meal plan (breakfast, lunch, dinner, and at least one snack)
Meal plan is high in protein, appropriate for muscle recovery for a weightlifter
Avoids lactose-containing ingredients or notes suitable substitutes
Plan is compact and concise, not overly long or verbose
task_description: write a compact,concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) requiring high-protein intake for muscle recovery

prompt_inputs.goal: muscle gain and recovery for endurance training

solution_criteria: All meals and foods listed are plant-based and contain no animal products or soy
Plan includes protein sources at each meal and totals a high daily protein amount appropriate for an athlete's muscle gain/recovery goal
Plan is presented compactly as a single day (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks) without excessive detail
Total daily calories/energy align with the athlete's size and training demands
task_description: write a compact,concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a vegan athlete needing a plant-based meal plan that still meets high energy and protein demands
